page.title: Audit log
page.subtitle: Security audit trail — secret, permission and service-account events.
page.accessDeniedDescription: The security audit trail needs the Reports permission. Ask an admin if you need access to this view.

export.exportAllTitle: Download every event matching the current filters (the whole range, not just this page)
export.exportTitle: Export the events currently visible (the filtered page)

empty.title: No audit events match these filters
empty.descriptionFiltered: Nothing in this log matches these filters. Try clearing one.
empty.description: Security-relevant actions on this source will show up here as your team works.
